validator_prompt: Verify whether VoltAgent/awesome-design-md was configured as a project-level design reference, whether PRODUCT.md and DESIGN.md are discoverable by the impeccable skill context loader, and whether the relationship between impeccable and awesome-design-md is explained correctly.

architect_review.summary: The project now has root PRODUCT.md and DESIGN.md files, a docs/design usage guide for VoltAgent/awesome-design-md, README discoverability, and loader evidence showing impeccable can read the context. The explanation correctly separates impeccable as a skill from awesome-design-md as a DESIGN.md reference library.
